creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


lha doesn't open temporary files exclusively, which makes it possible for an 
attacker to conduct a time-dependent attack by creating the file in advance. 

1. Your patches don't apply cleanly to the freebsd version. 

2. The problem with temporary files should be fixed 2000-07-31 (patch-af) 
Please check again, as the file is opened differently. 

3. You suggested to remove "make_parent_path" in extract_one(), 
which was added 2004-05-03 to fix a symlink vulnerability.
